title: Snitch 32x
description: It a 32x PvP pack for bedwars and other pvp gamemodes
body: This time I present you "Snitch 32x" PvP pack. its is a PvP texture pack its change texture of every item and GUI based on dark and neon colours. this pack make your PvP fight better and by adding new textures you can enjoy the minecraft new way.
